raw_prompt: Cinematic wedding reel, slow and emotional, warm tones, minimal text

intent.raw_prompt: Cinematic wedding reel, slow and emotional, warm tones, minimal text

image_analyses.description: A bride and groom in traditional Indian wedding attire standing outdoors in a garden setting, looking at each other affectionately.
image_analyses.moondream_caption: A groom wearing a light green turban and sherwani stands beside a bride in a heavily embroidered pastel lehenga and floral hair accessory, both posing in a lush green garden setting.

image_analyses.description: A close-up portrait of an Indian couple in traditional wedding attire outdoors, with the groom kissing the bride on the forehead.
image_analyses.moondream_caption: A groom in a light green turban and cream sherwani kisses the bride on her forehead, while she wears an intricate floral lehenga with gold jewelry and henna-decorated hands.

image_analyses.description: A romantic portrait of an Indian couple in traditional wedding attire outdoors, with the groom kissing the bride's forehead.
image_analyses.moondream_caption: An Indian bride and groom dressed in ornate, coordinated wedding attire are captured in a tender moment outdoors, with the groom gently kissing the bride's forehead while she smiles, surrounded by a soft-focus forest background.

image_analyses.description: A close-up portrait of an Indian couple dressed in traditional wedding attire, with the man gently kissing the woman on her forehead while she smiles with her eyes closed.
image_analyses.moondream_caption: An intimate portrait of an Indian couple in wedding attire; the man is wearing a sage green turban and cream sherwani, while the woman wears an intricately embroidered cream lehenga with gold and floral details, smiling as she is kissed on the forehead.

image_analyses.description: A loving Indian couple dressed in traditional wedding attire sitting together against a neutral background with lush greenery.
image_analyses.moondream_caption: A smiling Indian bride and groom in elaborate pastel-colored traditional wedding clothes pose together outdoors with greenery in the background.

storyboard.title: A Sacred Union
storyboard.narrative_arc: The narrative follows a classic romantic progression: starting with the arrival and initial connection in the garden, moving into the shared stillness of the couple, culminating in an intimate, tender moment of commitment.

storyboard:
Style: corporate_highlights
Pacing: Medium, professional (2–4 seconds per scene). Deliberate and polished.
Color Treatment: Clean, neutral color palette. Slight blue-teal grade.
  Avoid oversaturation. Keep skin tones accurate and professional.
Caption Style: Professional, sentence-case with company branding in mind.
  Example: "Q3 Product Launch" or "Team Excellence Award 2024."
Transition Preference: Clean slides (left-to-right) or subtle fades.
  Consistent transition direction throughout the video.
Animation Style: Slide-in animations for text overlays. Smooth linear easing.
  Lower-third style captions with background bar.
Narrative Arc: Opening brand moment → key milestones → team recognition → CTA.
Music Suggestion: Ambient corporate, light electronic, or soft orchestral.

Style: minimal_clean
Pacing: Slow to medium (3–5 seconds per scene). Intentional breathing room.
Color Treatment: Desaturated, near-monochrome with one accent color.
  High-key lighting, clean whites, and airy aesthetics.
Caption Style: Thin sans-serif font, small size. Lowercase, no punctuation.
  Example: "light and shadow" or "a quiet afternoon."
Transition Preference: Simple fade to white or pure cut. No flashy effects.
  Consistency is more important than variety.
Animation Style: Ultra-subtle opacity fade or slow horizontal drift.
  Avoid any scale or rotation animations.
Narrative Arc: Single mood or concept across all scenes. No strong arc.
Music Suggestion: Ambient drone, lo-fi, or silence with occasional sound design.

Style: cinematic_wedding
Pacing: Slow, lingering shots (4–6 seconds per scene). Allow emotions to breathe.
Color Treatment: Warm, golden-hour tones with slight desaturation on shadows.
  Use LUT-style color grading: lifted blacks, peachy highlights.
Caption Style: Minimal, italic lowercase captions. Emotional, poetic language.
  Example: "forever begins here" or "two families, one love."
Transition Preference: Slow dissolves (fade) and occasional dip-to-white.
  Avoid hard cuts unless emphasizing a vow moment.
Animation Style: Subtle Ken Burns (slow zoom-in or pan) on still images.
  Prefer ease-in-out interpolation. No aggressive motion.
Narrative Arc: Build from quiet arrival → intimate ceremony → joyful celebration.
Music Suggestion: Orchestral strings, piano, or acoustic guitar.
